description: Document your Tor session details for operational security. Save the raw HTML source code from https://check.torproject.org/ to /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/check_source.html and the displayed exit IP address to /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/exit_ip.txt (containing only the IP address). All files must be stored in the /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/ directory.
